data_attributes.description: Comma-separated data attribute names (wildcards allowed, e.g. data-*). When provided, each element's attributes map is filtered to matching attr__* keys, shrinking the response.

date_from.description: Start of the date range (e.g. -7d, 2024-01-01). Defaults to last 7 days.

date_to.description: End of the date range (e.g. 2024-01-31). Defaults to now.

filter_test_accounts.description: When true, applies the project's internal-and-test-account filters to the underlying events. Pass the lowercase string true; other truthy spellings are ignored.

include.description: Event types to include: $autocapture, $rageclick, $dead_click. Defaults to all three. Accepts repeated parameters, a JSON array, or a comma-separated list.

max_element_chain_depth.description: Maximum number of elements returned per chain, keeping the clicked element (order 0) and its nearest ancestors. Bounds the deep DOM ancestor chain up to <body> that inflates responses. Defaults to unbounded (the full chain).

properties.description: JSON-encoded list of property filters to apply to the underlying events, e.g. [{"key": "$current_url", "value": "https://example.com/page"}] or [{"key": "email", "value": "@posthog.com", "operator": "icontains", "type": "person"}]. Supports event, person, cohort, element, and HogQL property filter types.
